news.title:
Welspun Corp delays purchase of Mauritius unit stake to Sep 2026.
This extends the timeline from its earlier planned schedule.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp delays purchase of Mauritius unit stake to Sep 2026.
This extends the timeline from its earlier planned schedule.

news.title:
Welspun Corp secures Rs 1,000 Cr US pipe order, boosting order book to Rs 24,700 Cr.
The consolidated order book will be executed during FY26-FY28, ensuring business continuity.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp secures Rs 1,000 Cr US pipe order, boosting order book to Rs 24,700 Cr.
The consolidated order book will be executed during FY26-FY28, ensuring business continuity.

news.title:
Welspun Corp's subsidiaries completed a 22% stake transfer in EPIC for ₹2,450 crore on Tadawul Exchange.
Welspun Corp shares rose 3.95% to ₹800.85; FY26 EBITDA guidance now targets ₹2,500 crore, driven by strong orders.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp's subsidiaries completed a 22% stake transfer in EPIC for ₹2,450 crore on Tadawul Exchange.
Welspun Corp shares rose 3.95% to ₹800.85; FY26 EBITDA guidance now targets ₹2,500 crore, driven by strong orders.

news.title:
Welspun Corp fell 4.2%, closing at 770.4 on 23 Mar amid sector weakness.
The decline was due to technical challenges and reduced investor participation despite strong fundamentals.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp fell 4.2%, closing at 770.4 on 23 Mar amid sector weakness.
The decline was due to technical challenges and reduced investor participation despite strong fundamentals.

news.title:
Welspun Corp acquires 45% stake in WCSL to centralize corporate services.
The move aims to enhance governance and operational efficiency for Welspun Group.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp acquires 45% stake in WCSL to centralize corporate services.
The move aims to enhance governance and operational efficiency for Welspun Group.

news.title:
Indian stocks like L&T, Kalyan Jewellers, KEC International, and Welspun Corp have substantial Middle East exposure.
Projects include desalination, infrastructure, and transmission, with L&T's 49% intl orders, KEC's Q4 bids, and Welspun's $1.7k cr capex.
news.summary:
Indian stocks like L&T, Kalyan Jewellers, KEC International, and Welspun Corp have substantial Middle East exposure.
Projects include desalination, infrastructure, and transmission, with L&T's 49% intl orders, KEC's Q4 bids, and Welspun's $1.7k cr capex.

news.title:
Welspun Corp Ltd incorporates subsidiary Welspun International FZCO in Dubai.
The subsidiary will manage global marketing and trading for the parent firm.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp Ltd incorporates subsidiary Welspun International FZCO in Dubai.
The subsidiary will manage global marketing and trading for the parent firm.

news.title:
Welspun Corp's subsidiaries approved transferring a 100% equity stake in Welspun Pipes Co., KSA from WMHL to WGHL for $8M.
The inter-group transaction aims to streamline the holding structure and won’t impact operations, financials, or profitability.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp's subsidiaries approved transferring a 100% equity stake in Welspun Pipes Co., KSA from WMHL to WGHL for $8M.
The inter-group transaction aims to streamline the holding structure and won’t impact operations, financials, or profitability.

news.title:
Welspun Corp expects to exceed its FY26 profit target of ₹2,200 crore, aiming for ₹2,500 crore backed by strong execution and order pipeline.
Sintex revival is anticipated in FY27 with a revenue target of ₹1,000 crore, while Welspun Specialty Solutions sees strong demand in defence, nuclear, and power.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp expects to exceed its FY26 profit target of ₹2,200 crore, aiming for ₹2,500 crore backed by strong execution and order pipeline.
Sintex revival is anticipated in FY27 with a revenue target of ₹1,000 crore, while Welspun Specialty Solutions sees strong demand in defence, nuclear, and power.

news.title:
Welspun Corp reported flat Q3 Dec 2025 financials, deviating from earlier growth.
Despite high sales and profits, profitability metrics fell, Mojo Grade downgraded to Sell.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp reported flat Q3 Dec 2025 financials, deviating from earlier growth.
Despite high sales and profits, profitability metrics fell, Mojo Grade downgraded to Sell.

news.title:
Welspun Corp's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹6.2B from ₹4.34B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 13.6% from 12% YoY.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹6.2B from ₹4.34B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 13.6% from 12% YoY.

news.title:
Welspun Corp's board approved acquiring 2.57% equity in subsidiary Welspun Mauritius Holdings Ltd for $5.96M.
The acquisition streamlines overseas holding structure and has no material financial impact on the company.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp's board approved acquiring 2.57% equity in subsidiary Welspun Mauritius Holdings Ltd for $5.96M.
The acquisition streamlines overseas holding structure and has no material financial impact on the company.

news.title:
Welspun Corp Ltd announces a new export order for large diameter coated line pipes in Americas.
The order boosts the global order book to Rs 23,460 Cr, executable in FY26-FY28.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp Ltd announces a new export order for large diameter coated line pipes in Americas.
The order boosts the global order book to Rs 23,460 Cr, executable in FY26-FY28.

news.title:
Welspun Corp acquired 4.1% in WSSL for Rs 109 crore, raising its stake to 55.2%.
Promoter and promoter group holding in WSSL remains unchanged.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp acquired 4.1% in WSSL for Rs 109 crore, raising its stake to 55.2%.
Promoter and promoter group holding in WSSL remains unchanged.

news.title:
Welspun Corp Ltd has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, Welspun Global Holdings Ltd (WGHL), in Dubai International Financial Centre.
WGHL, with AED 100,000 paid-up capital, will act as an investment holding company to oversee global investments.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp Ltd has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, Welspun Global Holdings Ltd (WGHL), in Dubai International Financial Centre.
WGHL, with AED 100,000 paid-up capital, will act as an investment holding company to oversee global investments.

news.title: Welspun Corp launches Welspun Global IFSC Ltd in GIFT City for global treasury functions.
news.summary: Welspun Corp launches Welspun Global IFSC Ltd in GIFT City for global treasury functions.

news.title:
Welspun Corp's trading volume at 9:24 AM is 0.71x the 2-week average.
2 lakh shares worth Rs. 23 crore traded on NSE; CMP at Rs. 799.8, up 0.25.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp's trading volume at 9:24 AM is 0.71x the 2-week average.

news.title:
Nifty bulls aim for recovery from 'oversold' levels, key support at 25,850-25,900 zone.
Broader markets see heavy selling; IndiGo, Kaynes Tech, LT, and Welspun Corp in focus.
news.summary:
Nifty bulls aim for recovery from 'oversold' levels, key support at 25,850-25,900 zone.
Broader markets see heavy selling; IndiGo, Kaynes Tech, LT, and Welspun Corp in focus.

news.title:
Welspun Corp's subsidiary East Pipes wins Rs 1,165 crore order in Saudi Arabia.
Order involves manufacturing and supplying steel pipes for Saudi Water Authority.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp's subsidiary East Pipes wins Rs 1,165 crore order in Saudi Arabia.
Order involves manufacturing and supplying steel pipes for Saudi Water Authority.

news.title:
Welspun Corp's associate EPIC secured a 485M SAR (INR 1,165 cr) contract with Saudi Water Authority.
The 6-month contract's financial impact will reflect in Q4FY25-26 and Q1FY26-27.
news.summary:
Welspun Corp's associate EPIC secured a 485M SAR (INR 1,165 cr) contract with Saudi Water Authority.
The 6-month contract's financial impact will reflect in Q4FY25-26 and Q1FY26-27.
